favorites.login_prompt: Log in to save your favorite channels here.

schedule.no_alarms_subtext: Schedule an alarm here to wake up to your favorite creators.
schedule.login_prompt: Log in or create an account to set an alarm.

uploads.creator_subtitle: Upload audio clips and let listeners wake up to your voice every morning
uploads.no_channels_subtitle: Create a channel to start uploading content for your listeners.
uploads.no_uploads: No uploads yet. Hit Record to get started!
uploads.too_long_msg: You cannot upload an audio file that is more than 5 minutes in length.
uploads.too_short_msg: Audio clips must be at least 1 minute in length.

auth.app_tagline: Wake up to what you love
auth.agree_prefix: By creating an account, you agree to our
auth.choose_username: Choose a username for your account
auth.session_expired: Session expired. Please log in again.

account.title: Settings
account.fallback_subtitle: Choose a sound that plays if internet connection is lost.
account.no_alarms_msg: You have no alarms to delete.
account.delete_alarms_msg: This will delete all {{count}} alarm. This cannot be undone.
account.delete_alarms_msg_plural: This will delete all {{count}} alarms. This cannot be undone.
account.delete_account_msg: This will permanently delete your account, all channels, and all uploaded audio. This cannot be undone.
account.failed_delete: Failed to delete account. Please try again.

alarm_ringing.offline: Playing offline — connect to Wi-Fi to hear your channel

alarm_sheet.no_favorites: No favorite channels yet. Add some from the Browse tab.
alarm_sheet.login_to_see_favorites: Log in to see your favorites.

audio_row.listen_from_here_msg: All clips before this one will be marked as heard.
audio_row.set_listen_point: Set to listen from this point?
audio_row.set_listen_point_msg: This clip and all newer clips will be marked as not heard.

channel_settings.title: Channel Settings
channel_settings.description_placeholder: Tell listeners what your channel is about...
channel_settings.order_newest_desc: Listeners always receive your latest content
channel_settings.order_oldest_desc: Listeners start from your oldest content and work forward
channel_settings.order_shuffle_desc: A random clip plays each time
channel_settings.order_explanation: You may determine the default setting for the channel, but listeners may adjust this to their own preferences.

channel_sheet.login_for_alarm: Log in or create an account to set an alarm or save a favorite.
channel_sheet.login_for_favorite: You must be logged in to save a favorite.

create_channel.title: Create a Channel
create_channel.description_placeholder: Tell listeners what your channel is about...

finalize_audio.title: Finalize Audio
finalize_audio.release_locked: Already released — date cannot be changed

record.title: Record Alarm
record.length_hint: Alarms must be between 1 and 5 minutes in length.
record.microphone_needed: Microphone access is needed to record.
record.cancel_editing_msg: Are you sure you want to cancel your changes?
record.delete_recording_msg: Are you sure you want to delete this recording?

welcome.title: Welcome to Rooster Alarm!
welcome.body1: Here you can browse alarm 'channels', waking up to a new alarm every day. There's news, comedy, music, ambient sounds, and much more.
welcome.body2: Or turn on creator mode to record your own alarm channels, like a mini podcast for others to hear first thing in the day.
